---
title: Webhook Events (v2)
description: Reference for all v2 webhook events emitted by the Data Product Portal
sidebar_position: 9
---

<!-- Auto-generated by scripts/generate_webhook_docs.py — do not edit manually -->

The Data Product Portal emits webhook events following the [CloudEvents](https://cloudevents.io/) specification.
All events are delivered as HTTP POST requests to the configured endpoint.

## Configuration

Set the `WEBHOOK_V2_URL` environment variable to receive events.
When not set, no events are emitted.

## Envelope

Every event is wrapped in a CloudEvents envelope:

```json
{
  "specversion": "1.0",
  "id": "<uuid>",
  "source": "data-product-portal",
  "type": "data_product.created",
  "time": "2026-04-18T12:00:00Z",
  "data": { ... }
}
```

## Events


### Data Product Events

| Event | HTTP Trigger | Payload |
|-------|-------------|---------|
| `data_product.about_updated` | `PUT /v2/data_products/{id}/about` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse) |
| `data_product.created` | `POST /v2/data_products` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse) |
| `data_product.deleted` | `DELETE /v2/data_products/{id}` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse) |
| `data_product.input_port_linked` | `POST /v2/data_products/{id}/link_input_ports` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse) |
| `data_product.input_port_unlinked` | `DELETE /v2/data_products/{id}/input_ports/{input_port_id}` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse) |
| `data_product.setting_changed` | `POST /v2/data_products/{id}/settings/{setting_id}` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse) |
| `data_product.status_updated` | `PUT /v2/data_products/{id}/status` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse) |
| `data_product.team_member_added` | `POST /v2/authz/role_assignments/data_product` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse) |
| `data_product.team_member_removed` | `DELETE /v2/authz/role_assignments/data_product/{id}` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse) |
| `data_product.updated` | `PUT /v2/data_products/{id}` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse) |

### Output Port Events

| Event | HTTP Trigger | Payload |
|-------|-------------|---------|
| `output_port.about_updated` | `PUT /v2/data_products/{data_product_id}/output_ports/{id}/about` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse), [`output_port`](/docs/api/#schema/DatasetGet) |
| `output_port.created` | `POST /v2/data_products/{data_product_id}/output_ports` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse), [`output_port`](/docs/api/#schema/DatasetGet) |
| `output_port.deleted` | `DELETE /v2/data_products/{data_product_id}/output_ports/{id}` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse), [`output_port`](/docs/api/#schema/DatasetGet) |
| `output_port.link_approved` | `POST /v2/data_products/{data_product_id}/output_ports/{output_port_id}/input_ports/approve` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse), [`output_port`](/docs/api/#schema/DatasetGet) |
| `output_port.setting_changed` | `POST /v2/data_products/{data_product_id}/output_ports/{id}/settings/{setting_id}` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse), [`output_port`](/docs/api/#schema/DatasetGet) |
| `output_port.status_updated` | `PUT /v2/data_products/{data_product_id}/output_ports/{id}/status` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse), [`output_port`](/docs/api/#schema/DatasetGet) |
| `output_port.updated` | `PUT /v2/data_products/{data_product_id}/output_ports/{id}` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse), [`output_port`](/docs/api/#schema/DatasetGet) |

### Technical Asset Events

| Event | HTTP Trigger | Payload |
|-------|-------------|---------|
| `technical_asset.created` | `POST /v2/data_products/{data_product_id}/technical_assets` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse), [`technical_asset`](/docs/api/#schema/DataOutputGet) |
| `technical_asset.deleted` | `DELETE /v2/data_products/{data_product_id}/technical_assets/{id}` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse), [`technical_asset`](/docs/api/#schema/DataOutputGet) |
| `technical_asset.link_approved` | `POST /v2/data_products/{data_product_id}/output_ports/{output_port_id}/technical_assets/approve_link_request` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse), [`technical_asset`](/docs/api/#schema/DataOutputGet) |
| `technical_asset.link_denied` | `POST /v2/data_products/{data_product_id}/output_ports/{output_port_id}/technical_assets/deny_link_request` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse), [`technical_asset`](/docs/api/#schema/DataOutputGet) |
| `technical_asset.linked` | `POST /v2/data_products/{data_product_id}/output_ports/{output_port_id}/technical_assets/add` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse), [`technical_asset`](/docs/api/#schema/DataOutputGet) |
| `technical_asset.status_updated` | `PUT /v2/data_products/{data_product_id}/technical_assets/{id}/status` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse), [`technical_asset`](/docs/api/#schema/DataOutputGet) |
| `technical_asset.unlinked` | `DELETE /v2/data_products/{data_product_id}/output_ports/{output_port_id}/technical_assets/remove` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse), [`technical_asset`](/docs/api/#schema/DataOutputGet) |
| `technical_asset.updated` | `PUT /v2/data_products/{data_product_id}/technical_assets/{id}` | [`data_product`](/docs/api/#schema/GetDataProductResponse), [`technical_asset`](/docs/api/#schema/DataOutputGet) |
